bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch. build_default_factions() and _get_default_profile() initialized factions to 0.0 (Hostile tier) instead of FACTION_SCORE_START=20 (Neutral). Fixed all init paths + migration fallback + stale smoke test.
Deterministic minigame selection. pick_minigame_for_field() used field.hash() % size, always returning the same minigame for a given field. Changed to randi() % size for true randomization.

playtest_analysis.scope: Static analysis of core loop: Hub -> Biome -> Card -> Minigame -> Effects -> next card / end

flow: 1. start_run() -> resets state, dispatches START_RUN, shows parchment + narrator intro
2. _request_next_card() -> DAMAGE_LIFE drain (amount=0 per director decision), GET_CARD dispatch or buffer/prefetch/fastroute fallback
3. _handle_card_display() -> detect critical, post-process text, display in UI
4. _resolve_choice(option) -> determine field, run minigame, resolve_card() via MerlinCardSystem, apply effects via store dispatch RESOLVE_CHOICE
5. StoreRun.resolve_choice() -> applies modulated effects, increments cards_played, updates story_log, ticks ogham cooldowns, checks promise deadlines
6. StoreRun.check_run_end() -> checks life<=0, mission complete + 25 cards min, hard_max=50, returns tension_zone
7. If run_ended -> apply_run_rewards, show end screen. Else -> travel animation -> _request_next_card() (recursive await)
core_loop_trace.notes: Flow is complete and well-structured. Modular decomposition into 5 sub-modules is clean.

invariant_checks.evidence: LIFE_ESSENCE_MAX=100, LIFE_ESSENCE_START=100. _damage_life() uses maxi(old-amount, 0). _heal_life() uses mini(old+amount, 100). _apply_life_delta() in effect engine uses clampi(current+delta, 0, 100). All paths clamp correctly.

MerlinEffectEngine._apply_faction_reputation() line 461: capped_delta = clampi(delta, -20, 20). MerlinReputationSystem.add_reputation() line 41: capped = clampf(amount, -CAP_PER_CARD, CAP_PER_CARD). cap_effect('ADD_REPUTATION') also clamps to [-20, 20]. Triple-guarded.

MOS_CONVERGENCE = {soft_min_cards: 8, target_cards_min: 20, target_cards_max: 25, soft_max_cards: 40, hard_max_cards: 50}. StoreRun.check_run_end() enforces hard_max at 50 (forced end). MIN_CARDS_FOR_VICTORY=25 prevents early victory. Tension zones correctly assigned at soft_min=8.

_apply_faction_reputation() uses clampi(current+delta, FACTION_SCORE_MIN=0, FACTION_SCORE_MAX=100). Save system clamps on load (line 153). MerlinReputationSystem.add_reputation() clamps to [VALUE_MIN=0, VALUE_MAX=100].
_request_next_card() validates opts.size() >= 3 at line 442-443 and retries if malformed. _resolve_choice() uses clampi(option, 0, 2) for safe indexing.
_add_promise() and _create_promise() both count active promises and return false if active_count >= 2.

get_multiplier() reads from MULTIPLIER_TABLE in constants. The table itself should cap at 2.0 but this depends on MULTIPLIER_TABLE data. scale_and_cap() delegates to cap_effect() which enforces per-effect caps but not the global x2.0 cap.

broken_flow_checks.evidence: BUG-001 (missing await on DAMAGE_LIFE dispatch) and BUG-002 (missing await on recursive _request_next_card) from cycle 1 are now fixed: line 343 has 'await store.dispatch' and line 705 has 'await _request_next_card()'. Both confirmed in current code.

_request_next_card() checks 'not store' at line 335. _resolve_choice() checks 'not store or not is_instance_valid(store)' at line 505. start_run() checks 'not store' at line 167. All critical paths guarded.
Checked at: _request_next_card() line 331, after dispatch line 409, _resolve_choice() line 508/539/653, start_run() uses await safely. Prevents orphaned coroutines after scene changes.

LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0 makes the drain dispatch at line 343 a no-op (dispatches DAMAGE_LIFE:0). Not broken but dead code. The death check at line 345 can never trigger from drain alone. Death only occurs via card effects.
game_controller_minigame.gd line 81-93: 30s timeout with process_frame polling, returns fallback score 51 on timeout, cleans up game node.
Multiple fallback layers: 1) pre-generated buffer, 2) sequel card (30% chance), 3) MOS prefetch, 4) LLM dispatch, 5) FastRoute pool, 6) LLM retry. Comprehensive fallback chain.

remaining_known_issues.note: Both await bugs from cycle 1 confirmed fixed in current code

remaining_known_issues.description: RAG tension reads dead flux field instead of run.hidden.tension
Dead Souffle system reference in merlin_ai.gd center option cost
Dot notation dict access in ollama_backend.gd configure_from_registry()
ClassDB.class_exists dead code for MerlinOmniscient init

playtest_analysis.overall_assessment: Core game loop is structurally sound. The two fixed bugs (BUGFIX-MED-14 faction init, BUGFIX-MED-11 deterministic minigame) were the last gameplay-impacting MEDIUM issues. Remaining open bugs are dead code references that do not affect gameplay flow. All critical invariants (life 0-100, rep caps, MOS bounds, 3 options, promise cap) are properly enforced with multiple guard layers.
